name: recommendations
description: Evaluate and improve recommendation/next-steps slides — structured rows with owner, timeline, impact
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with table-style accountability layout, not paragraph prose or generic cards

prompts.text: Build a next-steps slide with 3 post-incident prevention measures, each with owner, timeline, and expected impact
Build a recommendations slide with 3 strategic initiatives for Q1, each with budget, owner, and success metric
Build a board recommendation slide with 4 capital allocation moves, each with rationale, investment size, and ROI
Build a product next-steps slide with 3 launches, each with PM owner, release quarter, and target KPI
Build a sales action plan slide with 4 actions to improve win rate, each with accountable leader and 90-day milestone
Build a people recommendations slide with 3 retention initiatives, each with sponsor, rollout timing, and success measure
Build a finance recommendations slide with 3 margin improvement levers, each with savings target and owner
Build a cybersecurity remediation slide with 4 actions, each with priority, owner, due date, and risk reduced
Build a post-merger integration action slide with 5 workstreams, each with lead, timing, and synergy value
Build an operations improvement slide with 3 plant actions, each with timeline, capex, and throughput impact
